evidence.claim: [MTOR] Positive control performs as expected -> RESCUE. STRING shows direct experimental interactions with RPTOR, RICTOR, RRAGA, RPS6KB1, AKT1, EIF4EBP1, RHEB (all 0.999); OpenTargets places MTOR at the top for the TSC association. Knockdown/inhibition normalizes mTORC1 hyperactivation.
